componentDescription: A group of radio buttons that allows a user to select a single option from a list.

children.description: Specifies the children elements to be rendered within the RadioGroup, typically Radio components.

name.description: An optional name for the radio group, used to group related radio buttons together.

label.description: An optional label displayed for the radio group, providing context to the user.

helperText.description: Optional helper text displayed below the radio group, offering additional guidance or information.

error.description: An optional error message or state to indicate validation issues.

value.description: The currently selected value of the radio group, making it a controlled component.

defaultValue.description: The initial selected value of the radio group when it is uncontrolled.

onChange.description: A callback function triggered when the selected radio button changes, receiving the new value.

direction.description: Specifies the layout direction of the radio buttons within the group (e.g., row or column).

spacing.description: An optional number representing the spacing between individual radio buttons.

isDisabled.description: A boolean flag to disable all radio buttons within the group, preventing user interaction.

isReadOnly.description: A boolean flag to make all radio buttons within the group read-only, allowing selection but preventing changes.

views.description: Optional styles object to customize the visual appearance of different parts of the RadioGroup.
